R0224.title: API Bulk-Call Resource Exhaustion
R0224.definition: Attackers call costly APIs at scale to consume quotas, inventory, compute capacity, or third-party service spend.
R0224.description: Attackers call costly APIs at scale to consume quotas, inventory, compute capacity, or third-party service spend.
R0224.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
